root.sql:
SELECT (select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_age(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)),1,30) as age_mem_text, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as approve_tdate, sc_mem_m_share_mem.period_recrieve, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as resign_tdate, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_result, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.remark, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as resign_approve_tdate, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.different_shareloan
,coalesce(( select sum(sc_mem_m_resign_loan.principal_balance) from sc_mem_m_resign_loan where sc_mem_m_resign_loan.resign_doc_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no ),0) as principal_balance
,coalesce(( select sum(sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.coll_amount) from sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll where sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.resign_doc_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no ),0) as coll_amount
FROM sc_mem_m_resign_requestment, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_share_mem WHERE ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_result = '1' ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code in ('1004','1005')) /*WHERE*/ --and ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_date between '01/01/2024' and '30/07/2024' ) order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no

r_mwa_member_req_resign_nomem_nest_loan.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_resign_loan.seq_no, sc_mem_m_resign_loan.loan_contract_no, sc_mem_m_resign_loan.principal_balance, sc_mem_m_resign_loan.interest, sc_mem_m_resign_loan.interest_arrear, '' as c_collateral, sc_mem_m_resign_loan.resign_doc_no, sc_mem_m_resign_loan.calint_from, ' ' as calint_from_tdate
,'มีหนี้เงินกู้'||( case left(loan_contract_no ,1) when 'ส' then 'สามัญ' when 'พ' then 'พิเศษ' when 'ฉ' then 'ฉุกเฉิน' else '' end) as c_loan_group
,pkb_amnat.fp_get_memcoll_str(sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no) as coll_name ,sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no
FROM sc_mem_m_resign_loan ,sc_mem_m_resign_requestment WHERE sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no = sc_mem_m_resign_loan.resign_doc_no and sc_mem_m_resign_loan.resign_doc_no = {0}

r_mwa_member_req_resign_nomem_nest_resig.sql: select sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.contract_mem_name ,sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.contract_memno ,sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.coll_amount ,PKB_MWA.fp_get_resign_loncoll_str(sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.resign_doc_no) as resign_coll from sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll where sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.resign_doc_no = {0}

r_mwa_member_req_resign_nomem_nest_text.sql:
SELECT 'ไม่มีหนี้สิน' as text
where 1=1

r_mwa_member_req_resign_nomem_nest_text_.sql:
SELECT 'ไม่ได้ค้ำประกันเงินกู้รายใด' as text
where 1=1
